analysis.macro_backdrop: Fed funds 3.50-3.75% hold. CPI Mar 2026: +3.3% YoY (elevated). FOMC Apr 28-29 with 99% hold probability. No BTC ETF SEC decisions expected in next 24h. Geopolitical: Middle East tensions declining (oil prices dropped).
analysis.technical_note: Key resistance $77.5K-$81K. Support at $75K (100-day MA). 200-day MA at ~$87.5K indicates bearish structure vs long-term avg. Negative funding rate = potential short squeeze catalyst if $77.5K breaks.
analysis.regime_rationale: Mixed signals: institutional buying and short-squeeze setup are bullish; but sentiment remains fearful (28), CPI elevated constrains Fed easing, and Easter holiday reduces liquidity. Confidence 0.40 is below 0.50 bot threshold - macro filter will NOT be applied this cycle.
sources: coindesk.com (BTC rally and technical analysis Apr 14-16 2026)
